sbe:messageSchema.description: Assets Engine money schema — balances, holds, settlement. All amounts are 8dp fixed-point int64.

composite.name: messageHeader
composite.description: Message identifiers and length of message root

sbe:message.name: Deposit
sbe:message.description: Credit available balance (external boundary)

field.name: correlationId
field.description: client-chosen id echoed on the ack; 0 = fire-and-forget

sbe:message.name: Withdraw
sbe:message.description: Debit available balance (external boundary)

field.name: correlationId
field.description: client-chosen id echoed on the ack; 0 = fire-and-forget

sbe:message.name: Hold
sbe:message.description: Reserve funds for an order (available -> locked)

field.name: correlationId
field.description: client-chosen id echoed on the ack; 0 = fire-and-forget

sbe:message.name: Release
sbe:message.description: Release a hold's residual (locked -> available). amount < 0 releases all remaining.

sbe:message.name: Settle
sbe:message.description: Apply a trade (feed-forward from the matching engine). Idempotent on tradeId.

field.name: journalPosition
field.description: ME settlement-journal egressSeq of this trade; drives consumePosition; 0 = direct ingress (tests/tools)

sbe:message.name: TerminalRelease
sbe:message.description: feed-forward from the ME journal: order reached terminal state; release the order's full residual hold; unknown/gone hold = no-op

sbe:message.name: QueryFeedPosition
sbe:message.description: read-only: answered with FeedPositionReport; deterministic no-op on state

sbe:message.name: RequestBalanceSnapshot
sbe:message.description: read-only: leader streams BalanceUpdate per (user,asset) then BalanceSnapshotEnd

sbe:message.name: RequestHoldSnapshot
sbe:message.description: read-only: leader streams HoldSnapshotEntry per hold then HoldSnapshotEnd

sbe:message.name: InitTradeHighWater
sbe:message.description: cutover primer: refused (no-op) unless the ledger is virgin (lastAppliedTradeId==0 and no accounts)

sbe:message.name: HoldAck
sbe:message.description: A hold was accepted

sbe:message.name: HoldReject
sbe:message.description: A hold was rejected

sbe:message.name: BalanceUpdate
sbe:message.description: A user's balance for one asset changed

sbe:message.name: SettlementApplied
sbe:message.description: A trade was settled (idempotency confirmation)

sbe:message.name: WithdrawReject
sbe:message.description: A withdrawal was rejected

sbe:message.name: DepositAck
sbe:message.description: A deposit was applied

sbe:message.name: WithdrawAck
sbe:message.description: A withdrawal was applied

sbe:message.name: FeedPositionReport
sbe:message.description: Answer to QueryFeedPosition: the ME journal cursor this AE has consumed

sbe:message.name: BalanceSnapshotEnd
sbe:message.description: Terminates the BalanceUpdate stream answering RequestBalanceSnapshot

sbe:message.name: HoldSnapshotEntry
sbe:message.description: One outstanding hold, streamed in answer to RequestHoldSnapshot

sbe:message.name: HoldSnapshotEnd
sbe:message.description: Terminates the HoldSnapshotEntry stream answering RequestHoldSnapshot
